title: Unify Lead Create/Edit Form
invariants_acknowledged: Audit notes PREDATE IFC-242: API client (api/tRPC), create auth guard, and edit zod validation were ALREADY unified — verified against current code, not the stale audit.

Do NOT regress IFC-242 BANT first-class behaviour: budget/authority/need/timeline + annualRevenue are dedicated Lead columns; create sends them structured; edit now round-trips them via change-tracker.
createLeadSchema/updateLeadSchema (@intelliflow/validators) are the single validation source; the shared LeadForm's validateLeadFormValues mirrors them; the server re-validates.
Edit sends the RAW tRPC input payload (z.input) — phone stays a string; never send transformed value objects (the IFC-242 F9 lesson).
qualificationNote is CREATE-ONLY (sourceOther/companySize/industry/notes have no column); the edit wrapper must never call buildQualificationNote.
estimatedValue cents<->dollars conversion is EDIT-ONLY (create has no deal-value input).
Page.tsx route shells are coverage-excluded; all form logic lives in LeadForm.tsx + change-tracker.ts + lead-form-utils.ts (instrumented), well-tested in the same commit (#382 lcov-absent trap).
ADR-046/PG-195: icons render as Material Symbols spans, NOT inline decorative SVGs.

The 3-step create wizard is KEPT (per the approved spec) to preserve its UX + ~26 tests; the >=30% LOC KPI is recorded honestly as 18.7% (clean prettier-compliant) — 30% would require dropping the wizard (a UX change, owner-approved to defer).
No false-isolation tests (IFC-265 lesson): page tests mock only the LeadForm body and still exercise the shell's real mutation/auth/onSubmit logic.
